memberdef.argsstring: (CAN_HandleTypeDef *hcan, const void *pHeader, const uint8_t aData[], uint32_t *pTxMailbox)
memberdef.name: HAL_CAN_AddTxMessage

briefdescription.para: STM32 CAN implementation — bxCAN + FDCAN dual-variant support.
